steps.t: Medwine is camped outside the Oathbreaker camp in northern Parth Celebrant. Idmar has advised you to seek out Medwine.
Medwine is camped outside the Oathbreaker camp in northern Parth Celebrant. Idmar has advised you to seek out Medwine.
Oathbreakers have appeared across Parth Celebrant. Medwine has told you to scout the camps to the east and west of Idmar's encampment to understand th…
Idmar is at his camp along the road in central Parth Celebrant. You should return to Idmar with news of your discoveries.
